title: Manappuram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Manappuram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
